title: Paint It, Black
album: Big Hits (High Tide and Green Grass) [UK]
why_this_song: Paint It, Black by The Rolling Stones (1966) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I want it painted black
I want them to turn black
I have to turn my head
I see a line of cars

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "black" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "black" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "painted" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "painted" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: My love will laugh with me

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Paint It, Black" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Paint It, Black" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Paint It, Black" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Paint It, Black"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Rolling Stones one question about "Paint It, Black", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Rolling Stones sobre "Paint It, Black", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Paint It, Black" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Paint It, Black" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
